title: Chicken soup
excerpt: The most delicious chicken soup for the cold weather. My friend Annelie van Schalkwyk and I made this lovely soup in Boussac. I make mine just a little different, with lemongrass. Good for anyone feeling a bit under the weather. We're talking power soup.
html:
The most delicious chicken soup for the cold weather. My friend Annelie van Schalkwyk and I made this lovely soup in Boussac. I make mine just a little different, with lemongrass. 

Good for anyone feeling a bit under the weather. We're talking power soup.

recipe.title: Chicken soup
recipe.author: Marinda Engelbrecht

items: 1.5 kg whole chicken (one nice big chicken)
3 litres chicken stock (dissolve 6 stock cubes in boiling water)

steps: Put everything in a pot and cook until the chicken is tender.
Take the chicken out, remove the skin and bones. Shred the chicken and return the meat to the soup. Now remove the star anise and lemongrass.
Enjoy the delicious soup with freshly baked bread.

notes: Taste your soup regularly as it cooks. Adjust it with lime juice, soy sauce or chillies to your taste, and add a little salt if you prefer.
If you like, you can add 200g risoni (rice noodles) towards the end and cook just a little longer until tender.
